name: QueryInput
description: QueryInput schema from Amazon DynamoDB API

TableName.description: The name of the table to query

IndexName.description: The name of a secondary index to query

KeyConditionExpression.description: The condition that specifies the key values for items to be retrieved

FilterExpression.description: A string that contains conditions for filtering the query results

ProjectionExpression.description: A string that identifies attributes to retrieve

ExpressionAttributeNames.description: Substitution tokens for attribute names in an expression

ExpressionAttributeValues.description: Values that can be substituted in an expression

ScanIndexForward.description: Specifies the order for index traversal (true=ascending, false=descending)

Limit.description: The maximum number of items to evaluate

ExclusiveStartKey.description: The primary key of the first item that this operation evaluates

Select.description: The attributes to be returned in the result
